analysis:
【今日摘要】
今日市場情緒緊繃，受美國對伊朗的軍事攻擊影響，石油價格大幅上漲，金價也波動不定。甲骨文因財報表現不佳而大幅下跌。太空探索技術的IPO即將發行，可能會吸引投資者的關注。好萊塢雖然仍是全球最具影響力的故事家，但印度的電影人正在積極嘗試使用人工智慧技術來創作電影。美國工會與Dauch Corp達成協議結束10天罷工。

【結語】
投資者務必謹慎行事，避免因市場波動而做出倉促的決定。今日市場情緒緊繃，但長期來看，投資在基本面良好的公司上仍是最穩健的選擇。投資者應該保持冷靜，做好風險管理，避免因恐慌而錯失良機。

【精選個股】
IPDQF - ImpediMed Limited - 公司財務表現穩定，股價有升值潛力。
NAVN - Navan, Inc. - 公司預估 FY27 年收入穩定，股價有持續上升的趨勢。
SAB - SAB Biotherapeutics, Inc. - 公司在FOCIS 2026 年會上發表會議幻燈片，內容未知，但股價有升值潛力。

風險提醒：投資者應該謹慎行事，避免因市場波動而做出倉促的決定。投資在基本面良好的公司上仍是最穩健的選擇，但風險仍存在。

items.title: Dow Jones Futures: Oil Rises On Iran Attacks, Oracle Dives; SpaceX IPO On Launch Pad
items.summary: Futures were little changed while oil prices rose as Trump launched new U.S. attacks vs. Iran. Oracle tumbled on earnings. The SpaceX IPO is on tap.
items.zh_title: 道瓊未來指數：伊朗攻擊油價上漲，甲骨文暴跌；太空探索技術IPO即將發行
items.zh_point: 道瓊未來指數今日微幅波動，油價因特朗普對伊朗發動新一輪攻擊而上漲。甲骨文因財報表現不佳而大幅下跌。太空探索技術的IPO即將發行。

items.title: Gold Whipsaws in Choppy Trading as US Completes New Iran Strikes
items.summary: (Bloomberg) -- Gold whipsawed after the US completed a fresh round of strikes against Iran, raising the stakes in a war that’s roiled global markets and stoked inflation.Most Read from BloombergHouse Republican Says Hegseth’s D-Day Remarks ‘Inappropriate’Tech Stocks Sink as Oil Jumps on US-Iran Jitters: Markets WrapXbox Plans Significant Layoffs as New CEO Plans OverhaulCuba Poised for Biggest US Fuel Shipment Since Cold War EmbargoH-1B Visa Rules Have Changed Again. What to KnowBullion rose as
items.zh_title: 金價在波動的交易中掀起波動 美國完成新一輪對伊朗的攻擊
items.zh_point: 金價在美國對伊朗的新一輪攻擊後波動不定，美伊戰事對全球市場造成了重大影響，同時也推高了通膨。

items.title: SpaceX IPO vs. Rocket Lab: Which Space Economy Stock Is the Better Buy?
items.summary: SpaceX offers dominance, but Rocket Lab offers greater upside.
items.zh_title: SpaceX IPO vs. Rocket Lab：太空經濟股哪一家買得更划算？
items.zh_point: SpaceX在太空市場佔有優勢，但Rocket Lab的成長潛力更大。

items.title: Applied Optoelectronics (AAOI) Soars Anew on AI Optimism
items.summary: Applied Optoelectronics Inc. (NASDAQ:AAOI) is one of the 10 Stocks Surviving Market Slaughter. Applied Optoelectronics jumped by 7.52 percent on Wednesday to finish at $175.13 apiece, as investors resumed buying positions in its stock amid strong investor optimism, fueled by the continued expansion of the artificial intelligence sector. Investor optimism can be partly attributed to […]
items.zh_title: 光電應用科技 (AAOI) 再度衝高，人工智慧領域持續擴張
items.zh_point: 光電應用科技 (AAOI) 股價在人工智慧領域持續擴張的背景下，投資人重新購買其股票，股價因此大幅上升 7.52%，達到每股 175.13 美元。

items.title: AmpliTech Group (AMPG) Is Up 42.6% After Unique AI-RAN Open RAN Breakthrough With NVIDIA
items.summary: AmpliTech Group recently took part in the O-RAN ALLIANCE Global PlugFest Spring 2026, where its O-RAN CAT B 64T64R Massive MIMO radio was the only American-designed radio at that specification to complete successful multi-vendor interoperability testing and support the world’s first open-source Massive MIMO AI-RAN demonstration with NVIDIA and Northeastern University. These achievements, alongside AmpliTech’s role in the broader Open RAN ecosystem, highlight its growing importance as a...
items.zh_title: AmpliTech Group (AMPG) 突破 42.6%：與 NVIDIA 合作開發 AI-RAN 的創新技術
items.zh_point: AmpliTech Group 在 O-RAN ALLIANCE 全球 PlugFest Spring 2026 中取得重大突破，成功完成多家廠商間的互操作性測試，並與 NVIDIA 和 Northeastern University 合作開發世界上首個開源式大規模 MIMO AI-RAN 示範系統。

items.title: Kuwait says it is intercepting 'aerial targets' after U.S. military strikes Iran
items.summary: President Donald Trump promised more attacks on Iran after strikes resumed this week. Earlier this week, he said a deal to end the war was near.
items.zh_title: 科威特稱正在攔截「空中目標」 美軍對伊朗進行攻擊
items.zh_point: 科威特宣布正在攔截來自未知方向的空中目標，美國軍方近日對伊朗進行了軍事攻擊，美國總統唐納德·川普（Donald Trump）表示將會對伊朗進行更多的攻擊，同時也表示伊朗戰爭的和平協議即將達成。

items.title: United Auto Workers reaches deal with Dauch Corp after 10-day strike
items.summary: This comes after a 10-day strike against the company at its Three Rivers, Michigan plant
items.zh_title: 美國工會與Dauch Corp達成協議結束10天罷工
items.zh_point: 美國工會與Dauch Corp在密西根州三河市的工廠進行10天的罷工後，最終達成協議結束罷工。

items.title: Inside India newsletter: Hollywood is debating AI. India's filmmakers are embracing it
items.summary: Even as Hollywood remains the world's most influential storyteller, experiments in AI filmmaking are increasingly happening in India.
items.zh_title: 好萊塢正在討論人工智慧，印度電影業卻正在大力採用它
items.zh_point: 好萊塢雖然仍是全球最具影響力的故事家，但印度的電影人正在積極嘗試使用人工智慧技術來創作電影。

items.title: Oil jumps as U.S. fresh strikes on Iran raise worries of extended disruption to energy flows
items.summary: Oil prices jumped on Thursday after the United States launched a fresh round of military strikes against targets in Iran.
items.zh_title: 美國對伊朗發動新一輪軍事攻擊　石油價格大幅上漲
items.zh_point: 美國對伊朗發動新一輪軍事攻擊，石油價格大幅上漲，擔心能源供應可能受阻。

items.title: Oracle beats on earnings, but stock drops on plans to raise another $20 billion
items.summary: Oracle topped quarterly expectations, but free cash flow is negative, and the company plans to raise more capital for data center projects.
items.zh_title: Oracle 獲利超預期，但股價下跌因籌措 2000 億美元資金
items.zh_point: Oracle 公布季度財報，獲利超過市場預期，但公司的自由現金流為負，且計畫籌措更多資金用於資料中心項目。

items.title: My plumber charged $160 to fix the cistern on my toilet — but created another problem. Do I pay again?
items.summary: “The cistern on my toilet has been constantly refilling and making a hissing noise.”
items.zh_title: 我叫水管工修理馬桶蓋蓄水箱，費用 160 美元，但又造成另一個問題，我該再付錢嗎？
items.zh_point: 我叫水管工修理馬桶蓋蓄水箱，費用 160 美元，但又造成另一個問題，我該再付錢嗎？水管工的錯誤修理導致馬桶蓄水箱不斷充水並發出嗶嗶聲。

items.title: My elderly mother and I own a home together. Will Medicaid force its sale?
items.summary: “My sister thinks Medicaid will take the house my mom and I own together.”
items.zh_title: 我和年長母親合夥擁有一棟房子，醫療補助會強迫我們出售嗎？
items.zh_point: 我姊姊認為，母親和我的共同擁有的房子，醫療補助會強迫我們出售。

items.title: When a World Cup team loses, its country’s stock market also goes down. Here’s the weird reason why.
items.summary: Soccer’s premier tournament brings a hidden danger to your investment portfolio.
items.zh_title: 世界盃失利，股市也跟著下跌？這是為什麼
items.zh_point: 世界盃足球賽的失利不僅影響球隊的形象，還可能影響投資者投資的股市表現。研究發現，當球隊在世界盃中失利時，相關國家的股市往往會下跌。

items.title: Social Security is facing a 22% cliff — 4 ways to build an income stream Washington can’t touch
items.summary: The countdown to insolvency is accelerating — and the rules of retirement planning just broke.
items.zh_title: 社會保障面臨22%的斷崖式危機 — 4種方法讓政府無法觸碰的收入流
items.zh_point: 社會保障系統即將破產，退休規劃的規則已經被打破，投資者需要儘快建立無法被政府觸碰的收入流。

items.title: Thinking about insider trading on prediction markets? Kalshi wants to make an example of you.
items.summary: Prediction-market companies are identifying hundreds of cases of suspected insider trading.
items.zh_title: Kalshi警告你：在預測市場內幕交易？我們會找出你！
items.zh_point: 預測市場公司正在追蹤數百宗疑似內幕交易案件，Kalshi警告投資者謹慎行事，以免成為下一個被起訴的案例。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下挫 受中國DeepSeek事件影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大部分下跌，納斯達克指數領跌，人工智慧基礎設施製造商股價大幅下跌，多家公司股價跌幅超過10%，Nvidia股價跌幅達16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 倫敦金銀市場結算下跌
items.zh_point: 倫敦金價下跌1.4%，銀價下跌2.5%，連續兩天下跌，銀價連續三天下跌三次。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的要點
items.zh_point: 中國新興公司宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，且成本低廉，並不需要使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度尋找不會讓美國AI巨頭沉沒
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌，恐慌情緒可能過度膨脹。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與電信週報：市場話題
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi 等公司在最新的市場話題中，受到關注。

items.title: ImpediMed Limited (IPDQF) Shareholder/Analyst Call Transcript
items.zh_title: ImpediMed Limited (IPDQF) 股東/分析師電話會議記錄
items.zh_point: ImpediMed Limited 股東與分析師進行電話會議，討論公司相關事宜。

items.title: Verizon: A Good Defensive Play In Times Of Market Exuberance
items.zh_title: 威訊：在市場狂熱時期的良好防禦性投資
items.zh_point: 在市場經歷了長期的上升後，投資者可能會開始尋找防禦性投資來減少風險。威訊（Verizon）是一家具有穩健財務和強大市場地位的通信公司，可能是投資者在市場狂熱時期的良好選擇。

items.title: Navan signals FY27 revenue of $907M-$913M with non-GAAP operating profit of $76M-$80M
items.zh_title: Navan 預估 FY27 年收入 907 萬美元至 913 萬美元，非 GAAP 運營利潤 760 萬美元至 800 萬美元
items.zh_point: Navan 預估 FY27 年收入 907 萬美元至 913 萬美元，非 GAAP 運營利潤 760 萬美元至 800 萬美元，表明公司財務表現穩定。

items.zh_title: SAB Biotherapeutics, Inc. (SABS) 在FOCIS 2026 年會上發表 - 幻燈片
items.zh_point: SAB Biotherapeutics, Inc. 在FOCIS 2026 年會上發表會議幻燈片，內容未知。

items.zh_point: Navan, Inc. 公布 2027 年第一季財報，內容包括財務表現、營運情況等相關資訊。

items.title: Trump administration urges judge to reject bid to block White House UFC event
items.zh_title: 特朗普政府要求法官駁回阻止白宮UFC活動的申請
items.zh_point: 美國特朗普政府要求法官駁回一項申請，申請者試圖阻止白宮舉辦一場UFC活動。

items.title: Prosecutor casts Palisades arson suspect as dejected loner, angry at society
items.zh_title: 檢察官將帕利薩德火災疑犯描繪為失落的孤僻者，對社會感到憤怒
items.zh_point: 檢察官指控帕利薩德火災疑犯是一個孤僻且對社會感到不滿的人，可能因為這些原因而犯下此案。

items.title: US Department of Justice formally moves to drop Halkbank case
items.zh_title: 美國司法部正式撤銷 Halkbank 案件
items.zh_point: 美國司法部決定放棄對 Halkbank 的訴訟， Halkbank 是一家土耳其銀行，曾因涉嫌違反美國對伊朗的制裁而被起訴。

items.title: SK Hynix shares rebound on report of tripling wafer capacity
items.zh_title: SK Hynix 股票反彈：三倍擴增晶圓生產能力
items.zh_point: SK Hynix 股票在市場上反彈，據報導公司正在擴增晶圓生產能力達三倍，可能對公司未來的發展產生重大影響。

items.title: OpenAI weighs steep price cuts amid competition from Anthropic  - WSJ
items.zh_title: OpenAI考慮大幅降價面對Anthropic競爭 - WSJ
items.zh_point: OpenAI可能會因為Anthropic的競爭而大幅降低價格，進一步加劇人工智慧市場的競爭局勢。
